narrative:
Maple Heights (precinct in Noble County) has 457 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.5 percentage points.
